text: BREAKING: Trump extends ceasefire with Iran INDEFINITELY. Same-day reversal — said extension was 'highly unlikely' on CNBC this morning, now posts on Truth Social: 'Government of Iran is seriously fractured.' Decision at request of Pakistan PM Sharif and Army Chief Munir. No end date. Blockade continues. Military ordered to 'remain ready and able.'
verificationNote: Confirmed by Axios, CBS News, NPR, Fortune, CNBC, Time. Fortune: 'Trump extends ceasefire after insisting he wouldn't.'

text: NAVAL: US seized M/T Tifani in Bay of Bengal (INDOPACOM) — ~2M barrels Iranian crude loaded at Kharg Island April 5, transited Hormuz April 9. Second ship interdiction in 2 days after Touska. US now enforcing oil sanctions across Indo-Pacific, not just Gulf. Iran Araghchi: blockade is 'act of war.'
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, Stars and Stripes, Military.com, JPost confirmed. Pentagon confirmed INDOPACOM boarding.

text: LEBANON: Hezbollah fired rockets at IDF in Rab al-Thalathine — FIRST attack since April 16 ceasefire. Drone launched toward northern Israel, intercepted. IDF struck launcher. IDF also struck individuals near al-Qusayr. Hezbollah claims 200+ Israeli violations since truce. Legal Agenda counted 220 Israeli breaches April 17-19 (3 killed, 7 wounded).
verificationNote: The National, Times of Israel, Israel Hayom, JPost, Cyprus Mail confirmed. Legal Agenda data from The National.

text: HORMUZ: Only 16 ships transited April 21 (9 in, 7 out, 2 Iranian-flagged). Near-total standstill continues — Day 51 of blockade, CENTCOM Day 9. ~2,163 vessels stranded. ~190M barrels Iran floating storage (~$15B deferred revenue). War-risk premiums at 2.5% hull value (60x pre-crisis). Brent spiked to $101.15 intraday before settling $98.48.
verificationNote: Bloomberg confirmed Hormuz transit data. Investing.com/CNBC confirmed oil prices. RealClear Energy confirmed floating storage.

text: STATUS: Ceasefire extended indefinitely. Vance Pakistan trip postponed — Iran refuses talks while blockade continues. Hegseth: Iran 'unable to replenish,' US 'locked and loaded.' Netanyahu Independence Day: ceasefire 'not the end.' Israel-US coordinating post-ceasefire attack plans. IRGC shows underground missile city. Ghalibaf: 'new cards on battlefield.'
verificationNote: DoW press release confirmed Hegseth. Times of Israel confirmed Netanyahu/Israel-US plans. IranWire confirmed IRGC footage. CNBC confirmed Ghalibaf.

text: Day 54 roundup: CEASEFIRE EXTENDED INDEFINITELY. Trump reversal. Tifani seized (2M bbl). Hezbollah fires at IDF (first since ceasefire). US suspends Iraq dollar access. OFAC sanctions 14 targets. Pentagon FY27: $1.5T (42% increase). 62 veterans arrested at Capitol antiwar protest. Oil $98.48. Gas $4.022. Mojtaba Khamenei still unseen — TIME: AI-generated videos.
verificationNote: Compiled from Axios, CBS, Al Jazeera, Stars and Stripes, The National, US Treasury, Washington Times, Military.com, Democracy Now, TIME, CNN. All verified.
